boundary: BOUNDARY := not (region accepted or atlas supplied or boundedness verified or metric supplied or connection supplied or physical detector support realized)

candidate_region_definition.set_builder: SupportCandidateB0 := {x_candidate in ChartCandidateB0 | t_minus <= x_candidate^0 <= t_plus and -L_1 <= x_candidate^1 <= L_1 and -L_2 <= x_candidate^2 <= L_2 and -L_3 <= x_candidate^3 <= L_3}
candidate_region_definition.set_definition: 0 s <= x_candidate^0 <= 1e-9 s; -0.001 m <= x_candidate^i <= 0.001 m for i in {1,2,3}

parameter_obligations.obligation: temporal and spatial coordinate units are declared explicitly
parameter_obligations.evidence: temporal unit s and spatial unit m supplied

realization_obligations.obligation: ChartCandidateB0 is defined on a spacetime manifold and covers the proposed support region
finite numerical or symbolic values satisfying all parameter inequalities are supplied
realization_obligations.evidence: t_minus=0 s; t_plus=1e-9 s; L_1=L_2=L_3=0.001 m

realization_obligations.obligation: the declared coordinate inequalities admit at least one point
realization_obligations.evidence: (5e-10 s,0 m,0 m,0 m) belongs to SupportCandidateB0

realization_obligations.obligation: boundedness is established in the declared coordinate topology
realization_obligations.evidence: all four coordinate components lie in finite closed intervals

realization_obligations.obligation: the eight declared coordinate faces realize the candidate region boundary
realization_obligations.evidence: the product of four closed intervals has exactly eight coordinate boundary faces

realization_obligations.obligation: the candidate region is physically realized as detector support

non_claims: does not supply coordinate parameter values
does not prove the region is nonempty
does not prove the region is bounded
does not prove the boundary realization
does not define a spacetime manifold
does not realize physical detector support
does not verify covariant current conservation
does not establish E = m c^3 as an energy law
next_weakest_point: Supply one bounded coordinate-chart candidate for ChartCandidateB0 without supplying or verifying metric data.

boundedness_certificate.reason: finite Cartesian product of bounded closed intervals

boundary_certificate.reason: two endpoint faces for each of four coordinates
